title: OG Image Generation Flow
description: Fetch command counts and extension data, render canvas via Playwright, and export the Open Graph JPEG image
activities: [for each entry in skillsDir] check isDirectory()
[if user-invocable AND not deprecated] increment count
Build HTML string: inject `commands` count and `extensionDataUrl` into template
chromium.launch() — launch headless Chromium via Playwright
page.setContent(html, { waitUntil: 'networkidle' }) — render page incl. Google Fonts
page.evaluate(() => document.fonts.ready) — wait for font load
page.screenshot({ path: OUTPUT_PATH, type: 'jpeg', quality: 90 }) — capture image
console.log generated path and KB size
decision_points: getCommandCount: fs.existsSync(skillFile) — skip directories without SKILL.md
getCommandCount: frontmatter regex match — skip files with no frontmatter
getCommandCount: isUserInvocable && !isDeprecated — only count qualifying skills
key_functions: getCommandCount(): void→number | reads source/skills/**/SKILL.md, parses YAML frontmatter, filters user-invocable non-deprecated entries
getExtensionDataUrl(): void→string | reads PNG file, returns base64 data URL
generateOgImage(): async void | orchestrates full flow — calls both helpers, builds HTML, launches Playwright, screenshots, closes browser
dependencies: Google Fonts CDN — Cormorant Garamond, Instrument Sans, Space Grotesk
data_flow: public/assets/extension-detection.png → getExtensionDataUrl() → base64 data URL → HTML
HTML string → Playwright page.setContent → rendered DOM → JPEG screenshot → public/og-image.jpg
important_notes: Script is fully self-contained: the HTML is injected via setContent (no server needed). Font loading is explicitly awaited via document.fonts.ready before screenshotting. Error handling wraps the top-level promise with process.exit(1) on failure.
